title: astragalus nummularius
intro: Astragalus nummularius, also known as the two-row milkvetch, is a perennial plant native to China, Russia, and parts of Asia, belonging to the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus nummularius include enhanced immune function, improved cardiovascular health, and reduced stress levels, making it a popular herbal remedy for various conditions. Astragalus nummularius is often prepared as a decoction, tea, or capsule, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
